title: Item Display
description: Want to display your items to decorate your world? That's what this pack does.
body:
This data pack adds item display cases that you can display dropped items that will never despawn and can never be picked up. Use this pack to display your cool items!

## Features:

- Make it glow in the dark like a glow item frame.
- Use a name tag to rename the item.
- Encase the item in glass to keep it safe from fire, lava, etc.
- More customizability coming soon!
 
## How To Use

1. Place down a valid display block.
2. Drop the item that you want to be displayed.
3. Then drop the item frame with the display item. (make sure your display item is dropped first)
4. To remove break the block and you will receive your item.

## How To Customize:
1. To change valid display blocks go to:
pack/data/item_display/tags/blocks/display_blocks.json
2. Inside that file, you can change what blocks are valid.
3. Once you have changed it type '/reload' to reset the datapack


## Valid Blocks:
- gold_block
- iron_block
- diamond_block 
- emerald_block
- redstone_block
- quartz_block
- coal_block
- chiseled_stone_bricks

## FAQ
### Can I add this to my mod pack?
Sure, as long as you give proper credit and follow the license.

### Are you going to downgrade to older versions (ie; 1.15, 1.12, 1.8)?
I will if there is enough demand for a certain version and I have time to.
